previousRound.summary: 2 passed (VAL-ROUTE-001, VAL-ROUTE-006), 4 blocked (VAL-ROUTE-002, VAL-ROUTE-003, VAL-ROUTE-004, VAL-ROUTE-005) due to OAuth token expiry. Round 3 resolves OAuth issue but run execution is non-terminating.

summary: Round 3 re-run for routing-enforcement milestone. OAuth token issue resolved (service-account path used). Webhook accepts presets correctly and config resolution shows correct effectiveSources per preset. However, runs do not reach terminal state within test window — run stays 'running' after 90+ seconds of polling. Routing enforcement logic is verified by config evidence, but terminal outcomes (source counters, write results, completion state) cannot be validated until run execution completes. Blocking issue is now execution non-termination, not credential unavailability.
